grok_video_prompt.selection_instruction: Use only biscoito_05_casual_thirst_trap_tasteful. Do not combine it with another variation.
grok_video_prompt.main_instruction: Animate the woman from the uploaded base image as a real adult woman casually presenting her outfit in a hyper-realistic POV-style phone video. The video must feel attractive, charismatic and attention-grabbing, with a slightly flirty confidence, but still natural, tasteful and realistic. Preserve the original person, face, body, outfit, lighting, camera angle and background exactly.

global_rules.base_image_usage: Use the uploaded image as the only visual source.
global_rules.identity: Preserve the exact same woman from the image. Do not change facial structure, body proportions, skin tone, hair, expression style or age appearance.
global_rules.outfit: Preserve the exact same outfit from the image. Do not add or remove clothing details.
global_rules.environment: Preserve the original background, lighting, shadows, camera angle, lens perspective and composition.
global_rules.camera: POV phone recording, subtle handheld micro-movements only, no zoom, no shake, no cinematic camera movement.
global_rules.style: Hyper-realistic, casual, magnetic, soft flirt energy, confident but not exaggerated.
global_rules.audio: No talking, no voice, no music, no sound effects.
global_rules.visual_restrictions: No text, no subtitles, no UI, no overlays, no effects, no stickers, no logos.
global_rules.sexualization_limit: Attractive and attention-grabbing, but tasteful. No explicit sexual behavior, no vulgar posing, no exaggerated sensuality, no twerking, no licking lips, no inappropriate gestures.

variation.name: Chamar atenção naturalmente
variation.best_for: A more 'biscoitando' version while still looking like a real casual fashion recording.
variation.viewer_hook_goal: Create stronger visual attraction using confidence, timing, eye contact, subtle smile, posture and outfit presentation, without becoming vulgar.

timeline.action: The subject starts with her face neutral, looking slightly away from the camera. Her body remains relaxed and natural.
She turns her eyes toward the camera first, then slowly turns her head. The movement should feel magnetic but realistic.
A soft confident smile appears briefly. She slightly shifts her weight, creating a natural curve in the posture without exaggeration.
One hand moves naturally to the waist. The other hand stays relaxed near the body.
She gently rotates her torso a few degrees to show the outfit fit. The movement is subtle, attractive and casual.
She lightly touches the existing front or side fabric area, smoothing it delicately with relaxed fingers.
She releases the fabric and takes one small step forward, keeping the camera framing stable and natural.
She briefly brushes hair backward near the side of the head. The gesture is quick, effortless and realistic.
She looks directly at the camera with a warm soft smile, then lets the smile fade naturally before the end.

variation.expression_direction: More magnetic than neutral, but never exaggerated. Use soft eye contact, tiny smiles and relaxed confidence.
variation.best_for_pt: Aumentar a atração visual com naturalidade e sem exagero.
